upgrades.name: Vitality Training
upgrades.description: Rigorous conditioning hardens the body, increasing maximum health.

upgrades.name: Brutal Strikes
upgrades.description: Learn to hit where it hurts, increasing base damage output.

upgrades.name: Swift Feet
upgrades.description: Dance faster through the dungeon, outpacing even swift enemies.

upgrades.name: Acrobatic Training
upgrades.description: Master the air, gaining the ability to double-jump to reach new heights.

upgrades.name: Critical Precision
upgrades.description: Strike at weak points with deadly accuracy, greatly increasing critical hit chance.

upgrades.name: Serum Resistance
upgrades.description: Build immunity to toxins through controlled exposure therapy.

upgrades.name: Vampiric Strikes
upgrades.description: Your weapons become fangs, stealing life from enemies with each hit.

upgrades.name: Shadow Meld
upgrades.description: Learn to blur into shadows when danger approaches, granting dodge chance.

upgrades.name: Arcane Intensification
upgrades.description: Focus magical energy into devastating offensive power.

upgrades.name: Whirlwind Strike
upgrades.description: Spin with devastating force, striking all nearby enemies.

upgrades.name: Piercing Strikes
upgrades.description: Your attacks ignore enemy armor entirely.

upgrades.name: Undying Will
upgrades.description: Refuse death itself, staying on your feet when others would fall. Breaks once per floor.
